productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck With Tipping Collar Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue polo shirt made of 100% cotton, with a front buttoned rugged placket, ribbed collar with black piping, velvetty collar in-seam, short sleeves with ribbed hems and black piping, embroidered ucb branding on an Italian badge sitting atop olive branches on left chest, embroidered brand information on right chest and vented hemsFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtly stylish, this polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton is perfect for those casual days. Ever since it's inception in 1965, UCB has actively helped alleiviate humanity, and this shirt describes the wholesome aim of UCB - Peace - with the embroidered badge and olive branches on the left chest. The black detailing along the collar and sleeves adds to this shirt a regal look. The ribbed sleeves accentuate your well-toned arms, while the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
